scope: artifact-only SERP snippet CTR package for 8 MBTI64 V2.1 pilot URLs; no runtime, CMS, sitemap, llms, Search Queue, or search submit changes.

source_inputs.measurement_warning: All 8 titles contain a duplicated brand suffix pattern: '| FermatMind | FermatMind'. Handle in MBTI64-SERP-SNIPPET-CTR-PACKAGE-01.

rows.package_expected_description: Compare INTJ-A and INTJ-T by confidence, stress recovery, decision review, relationships, work style and self-check prompts.
rows.ctr_hypothesis: Removing the duplicated brand suffix should reduce visual noise in SERP titles while preserving the CMS-authored query phrase and brand once.
